testsuite.name: 规则生命周期端到端测试

testcase.name: 完整规则生命周期流程测试

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-29 17:22:52.881 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.s.l.RuleLifecycleService - 创建规则: ruleKey=e2e_test_rule, operator=e2e_test_user_3 2026-03-29 17:22:52.885 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.s.l.RuleLifecycleService - 更新规则并创建新版本: ruleKey=e2e_test_rule, newVersion=2, operator=e2e_test_user_3 2026-03-29 17:22:52.885 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.s.l.RuleLifecycleService - 更新规则并创建新版本: ruleKey=e2e_test_rule, newVersion=3, operator=e2e_test_user_3 2026-03-29 17:22:52.889 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.s.l.RuleLifecycleService - 创建规则: ruleKey=e2e_test_rule, operator=e2e_test_user_2 2026-03-29 17:22:52.889 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.s.l.RuleLifecycleService - 删除规则: ruleKey=e2e_test_rule, operator=e2e_test_user_2 2026-03-29 17:22:52.891 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.s.l.RuleLifecycleService - 创建规则: ruleKey=e2e_test_rule, operator=e2e_test_user 2026-03-29 17:22:52.892 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.s.l.RuleLifecycleService - 更新规则并创建新版本: ruleKey=e2e_test_rule, newVersion=2, operator=e2e_test_user 2026-03-29 17:22:52.893 [Test worker] INFO c.e.r.s.l.RuleLifecycleService - 删除规则: ruleKey=e2e_test_rule, operator=e2e_test_user
